case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. ARIC Y TONG

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT TONG, ARIC Y SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-2020
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200009603) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200009603) FILED BY DEFENDANT TONG, ARIC Y AS TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUL-11-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-11-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TONG, ARIC Y $2,885.72 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,710.72, SEE SCANNED DOC

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 210011450) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT TONG, ARIC Y
